get.description: SSE stream of LLM tokens while the job is running.

edited_text.title: Edited Text
edited_text.description: Replacement text for the LLM output. Empty string keeps the original.

segment.title: Segment
segment.description: The text segment that prompted the question.

question.title: Question
question.description: The clarification question to present to the user.

answers.title: Answers
answers.description: Map of question text to answer text for each clarification request.

free_prompt.title: Free Prompt
free_prompt.description: Additional instruction appended to the retry prompt.

edited_text.title: Edited Text
edited_text.description: Optionally replace the existing output before retrying.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this context entry.

text.title: Text
text.description: The context text injected into LLM prompts.

context.title: Context
context.description: Optional freeform context injected into every system prompt.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: Number of Qdrant results to retrieve per query.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this context entry.

text.title: Text
text.description: The context text injected into LLM prompts.

document_context.title: Document Context
document_context.description: Free-text context attached by the user to guide LLM stages.

context_ref.title: Context Ref
context_ref.description: UUID of a saved context entry linked to this document.

current_job_id.title: Current Job Id
current_job_id.description: UUID of the active job row for the current pipeline stage.

has_image.title: Has Image
has_image.description: True if a source PNG image is available.

stage_displays.title: Stage Displays
stage_displays.description: Completed stage outputs available for display.

needs_context.title: Needs Context
needs_context.description: True if the document's current stage is blocked waiting for context.

id.title: Id
id.description: UUID of the active job row for the current stage.

doc_id.title: Doc Id
doc_id.description: UUID of the document this job belongs to.

current_stage.title: Current Stage
current_stage.description: Name of the stage the document is currently in.

needs_context.title: Needs Context
needs_context.description: True if the current stage is blocked waiting for context input.

context_required.title: Context Required
context_required.description: True when the current stage requires context before it can run at all.

embed_image.title: Embed Image
embed_image.description: Whether the embed stage should include a visual image vector.

review.description: Present when the document is waiting for human review.

replay_stages.title: Replay Stages
replay_stages.description: Completed stages the job can be rewound to.

id.title: Id
id.description: Monotonically increasing internal event ID (used as cursor).

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was recorded.

stage.title: Stage
stage.description: Pipeline stage name at time of event.

doc_id.title: Doc Id
doc_id.description: UUID of the document this job belongs to.

current_stage.title: Current Stage
current_stage.description: Name of the stage the document is currently in.

needs_context.title: Needs Context
needs_context.description: True if the current stage is blocked waiting for context input.

nextPageToken.title: Nextpagetoken
nextPageToken.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `pageToken` on next request. Null when no more pages.

nextPageToken.title: Nextpagetoken
nextPageToken.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `pageToken` on next request. Null when no more pages.

nextPageToken.title: Nextpagetoken
nextPageToken.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `pageToken` on next request. Null when no more pages.

nextPageToken.title: Nextpagetoken
nextPageToken.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `pageToken` on next request. Null when no more pages.

nextPageToken.title: Nextpagetoken
nextPageToken.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `pageToken` on next request. Null when no more pages.

context.title: Context
context.description: Optional freeform context injected into every system prompt.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: Number of Qdrant results to retrieve per query.

title.title: Title
title.description: Updated document title. Null clears the title.

document_context.title: Document Context
document_context.description: Free-text context to attach to the document. Null clears it.

context_ref.title: Context Ref
context_ref.description: UUID of a context entry to link, or null to unlink.

embed_image.title: Embed Image
embed_image.description: Set to true/false to control image embedding for the embed stage.

stage_count.title: Stage Count
stage_count.description: Number of stages in the pipeline.

document_context.title: Document Context
document_context.description: Free-text context to attach to the document.

context_ref.title: Context Ref
context_ref.description: UUID of a saved context entry to link.

stage.title: Stage
stage.description: Name of the pipeline stage to rewind to.

stage_name.title: Stage Name
stage_name.description: Name of the stage awaiting review.

input_field.title: Input Field
input_field.description: Source field name fed into the LLM prompt.

output_field.title: Output Field
output_field.description: Field name where the LLM output is stored.

input_text.title: Input Text
input_text.description: The text sent to the LLM.

is_single_output.title: Is Single Output
is_single_output.description: True when the stage writes a single output field.

qa_rounds.title: Qa Rounds
qa_rounds.description: Number of clarification rounds completed so far.

clarification_requests.title: Clarification Requests
clarification_requests.description: Questions the LLM raised that need answers before it can proceed.

document_context_update.title: Document Context Update
document_context_update.description: Suggested update to the document's context field, proposed by the LLM.

linked_context_update.title: Linked Context Update
linked_context_update.description: Suggested update to the linked context entry, proposed by the LLM.

context_ref.title: Context Ref
context_ref.description: UUID of the linked context entry, if any.

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: Map of field name to text value for each output produced by the stage.

text.title: Text
text.description: Updated context text. Null leaves unchanged.
